stem: The graph of the rational function f is shown, where y = f(x) and x ≥ 0. Which of the following is the graph of y = f(x) + 5, where x ≥ 0 ?
explanation: Adding 5 to f(x) shifts the entire graph up 5 units. The original passes through (3, 3), so the new graph must pass through (3, 8); only choice D is the original curve raised by 5.
